CWvsContext::OnFriendResult.note: Dispatcher — reads Decode1(mode) then switches. Wire shape identical to v83/v95 for all sub-modes.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#ListUpdate.note: mode=7/10/18 (LOADED/LIST_UPDATE/RESET). Calls CFriend::Reset(v2) — reads the full friend-list wire from the packet. Wire identical to v83.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Update.note: mode=8. Calls sub_AD8963 — wire identical to v83.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Invite.note: mode=9 (INVITE). Reads characterId+name then sub_AD8963(friend-list). Wire identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Error.note: mode=0x10/0x11/0x13/0x16. Conditionally reads Decode1(hasMsg)+DecodeStr(msg). Wire identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult.note: Dispatcher — Decode1(mode)-3 dispatch: mode=3→Display (reads list of GW_Memo), mode=4→SendSuccess, mode=5→SendError variants, mode=7→Refresh. Wire shape identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Display.note: mode=3. Reads Decode1(count) then GW_Memo::Decode per entry. Wire identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendSuccess.note: mode=4. No further reads. Wire identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendError.note: mode=5. Reads Decode1(errorCode). Wire identical to v83/v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Refresh.note: mode=7 (value 3+4). No further reads beyond mode byte. Wire identical to v83/v95.

CField::SendChatMsg.note: Chat message send. Wire shape identical to v83/v95.

calls.comment: nEmotion (emote ID, packed with extra data in v95)

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#InviteDeclined.note: mode=5 (OnBlocked). Reads DecodeStr(characterName). Wire identical to v83/v95.

CUIMessenger::OnDestroy.note: Messenger destroy — no dedicated function; messenger close handled by the mode=2 (Leave) path.

CUIMessenger::ProcessChat.note: Outbound chat in messenger — sends mode+message. Wire identical to v83/v95.

CUIMessenger::SendInviteMsg.note: Send invite request. Wire identical to v83/v95.

CMob::GenerateMovePath.notes: Opcode 0xC8. v87 wire shape matches v95 / JMS-v185 — the `(GMS && >83) || JMS` gates open the multiTargetForBall and randTimeForAreaAttack count+loop blocks, the hackedCodeCRC field between flyCtxTargetY and the Flush body, and the post-Flush bChasing/hasTarget/bChasing2/bChasingHack/tChaseDuration tail. Decompile cross-check at GMSv87_4GB.exe:0x6a6381 confirms COutPacket(0xC8) → Encode4 mobId → Encode2 ctrlSN+1 → Encode1 packed flags → Encode1 actionType → Encode4 skill m_Data → Encode4 multiTargetForBall count + 2×Encode4 per entry → Encode4 randTimeForAreaAttack count + 1×Encode4 per entry → Encode1 state → Encode4 hackedCode → Encode4 flyCtxTargetX → Encode4 flyCtxTargetY → Encode4 hackedCodeCRC → CMovePath::Flush → Encode1 bChasing → Encode1 hasTarget → Encode1 bChasing2 → Encode1 bChasingHack → Encode4 tChaseDuration.

calls.comment: flags byte (atlas dwFlag — multiBitFlag with nMoveType / bRiseByToss / etc.)

CStage::OnSetField.notes: SET_FIELD (clientbound, GMS v87). ENVELOPE-ONLY audit: the CharacterData blob (CharacterData::Decode @0x7c440a) is audited under the character domain (task-028) and is represented here by a single DecodeBuf boundary marker. v87 wire order (bCharacterData=1 branch): DecodeOpt(2, CClientOptMan::DecodeOpt @0x7c42c5) + channelId(4, Decode4 @0x7c42db) + sNotifierMessage(1) + bCharacterData(1) + nNotifierCheck(2) + [notifier string loop if !=0] + 3x seed(4) + CharacterData + OnSetLogoutGiftConfig(4x int32) + timestamp(8, DecodeBuffer p,8u). CROSS-VERSION (task-068 Phase 3 v87): v87 reads NO m_dwOldDriverID after channelId — sNotifierMessage (Decode1 @0x7c42fa) is read immediately after channelId(@0x7c42db), matching v83 @0x776020 and unlike v95 @0x71a0a0 which inserts an unconditional Decode4 there. Field introduced between v87 and v95. Atlas gate GMS>=95 CONFIRMED correct.

calls.comment: DecodeOpt (CClientOptMan::DecodeOpt @0x7c42c5) — atlas WriteShort(0) gated (GMS>83 || JMS); present v87
sNotifierMessage flag (HIBYTE, @0x7c42fa) — read immediately after channelId; v87 has NO m_dwOldDriverID Decode4 between (unlike v95)
nNotifierCheck (@0x7c431e; atlas writes 0 — no notifier title/content loop)
CharacterData::Decode (@0x7c440a) — ENVELOPE BOUNDARY; inner shape audited under character domain (task-028)
m_bPredictQuit (OnSetLogoutGiftConfig @0x7c4412) — atlas logout-gift int #1, gated (GMS>83 || JMS)

CStage::OnSetField#WarpToMap.notes: SET_FIELD warp path (clientbound, GMS v87). Same CStage::OnSetField handler @0x7c429c with bCharacterData=0 — the else branch (no CharacterData blob, @0x7c4423). v87 wire order: DecodeOpt(2) + channelId(4) + sNotifierMessage(1) + bCharacterData(1) + nNotifierCheck(2) + reviveFlag(1, @0x7c4423) + dwPosMap/mapId(4, @0x7c447b) + nPortal(1, @0x7c449d) + nHP(2, Decode2 @0x7c44a8) + bChaseEnable(1, @0x7c44c2) + [if chase: targetX(4)+targetY(4)] + timestamp(8). CROSS-VERSION (task-068 Phase 3 v87): (1) NO m_dwOldDriverID after channelId — matches v83, unlike v95. (2) nHP is Decode2 (2 bytes, @0x7c44a8 LOWORD), matching v83 @0x776020 and unlike v95 @0x71a0a0 which reads Decode4. nHP width widened between v87 and v95. Atlas nHP gate GMS>=95 (4 bytes) CONFIRMED correct.

calls.comment: DecodeOpt — atlas WriteShort(0) gated (GMS>83 || JMS); present v87
sNotifierMessage flag (@0x7c42fa; atlas writes 0) — no m_dwOldDriverID before it in v87
bCharacterData flag (@0x7c4307; atlas writes 0 — warp path)
revive flag (else branch @0x7c4423) — atlas WriteByte(0) gated (GMS>28 || JMS)
nHP — v87 Decode2 (2 bytes, LOWORD @0x7c44a8), matches v83; v95 reads Decode4. atlas WriteShort(2) for GMS<95

CField::OnFieldEffect#Summon.notes: FIELD_EFFECT case 0 (summon). CField::OnFieldEffect@0x55a910 case 0: Decode1(mode=0) + Decode1(effect v4 @0x55a948) + Decode4(x a2 @0x55a952) + Decode4(y v5 @0x55a95c). Maps atlas EffectSummon. v87 byte-identical to v95 (case 0 @0x53b790).

CField::OnFieldEffect#Tremble.notes: FIELD_EFFECT case 1 (tremble). CField::OnFieldEffect@0x55a910 case 1: Decode1(mode=1) + Decode1(bHeavyNShortTremble v18 @0x55abbb) + Decode4(delay v19 @0x55abbe) -> Effect_Tremble. Maps atlas EffectTremble. v87 byte-identical to v95 (case 1 @0x53bb74).

CField::OnFieldEffect#String.notes: FIELD_EFFECT cases 2 (object/SetObjectState @0x55a9fb), 3 (screen/ShowScreenEffect @0x55aa2a), 4 (sound/play_field_sound @0x55aa7b), 6 (BGM/PlayBGM @0x55ab0c). Each: Decode1(mode) + DecodeStr(name/path). Maps atlas EffectString. v87 byte-identical to v95 (cases @0x53b8b3).

CField::OnFieldEffect@0x55a910 case 5: Decode1(mode=5) + Decode4(monsterId v34 @0x55aac5) + Decode4(currentHp v40 @0x55aacf) + Decode4(maxHp a2 @0x55aad9) + Decode1(tagColor v14 @0x55aae5) + Decode1(tagBackgroundColor v15 @0x55aae7). Maps atlas EffectBossHp. v87 byte-identical to v95 (case 5 @0x53b9c1).

CField::OnFieldEffect#RewardRullet.notes: FIELD_EFFECT case 7 (reward roulette / Effect_RewardRullet). CField::OnFieldEffect@0x55a910 case 7: Decode1(mode=7) + Decode4(nRewardJobIdx v20 @0x55abea) + Decode4(nRewardPartIdx v21 @0x55abf3) + Decode4(nRewardLevIdx v22 @0x55abf5). Maps atlas EffectRewardRullet. v87 byte-identical to v95 (case 7 @0x53bba4).

CField::OnBlowWeather.notes: BLOW_WEATHER (GMS v87). CField::OnBlowWeather@0x55c953: Decode1(m_nBlowType v3 @0x55c967) + Decode4(itemId v5 @0x55c97f); DecodeStr(message @0x55c99a) ONLY in the else branch (itemId!=0 && m_nBlowType==0, gated by if(!v5 || this[162]) @0x55c98b). Atlas EffectWeather (BAD-FORM single struct): WriteBool(!active)=blowType + WriteInt(itemId) + if active: WriteAsciiString(message). v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x5468f0); conditional message is a tool limitation (per-mode table in FieldEffectWeather.md).

calls.comment: message (only when itemId!=0 && m_nBlowType==0; start path, @0x55c99a)

CField::OnClock.notes: CLOCK (GMS v87). v87 has NO standalone CField::OnClock symbol — the clock-set handler is inlined as sub_55DA5F@0x55DA5F (3x CClock::SetTimer callers). Dispatches on a leading clockType byte (Decode1 v4 @0x55da76) to 5 arms: case 0 EventClock (Decode4 seconds @0x55dd6d), case 1 TownClock (3x Decode1 hour/min/sec @0x55dd40-4d), case 2 TimerClock (Decode4 seconds @0x55dd0f), case 3 EventTimerClock (Decode1 enable @0x55dac2 + Decode4 seconds @0x55dae6), case 0x64 CakePieEventTimerClock (Decode1 enable + Decode1 flag2 v9 @0x55dadd + Decode4 seconds @0x55dae6). Atlas Clock (BAD-FORM single struct) Encode switches on the same clockType. v87 ALL 5 ARMS byte-identical to v95 (CField::OnClock@0x531510). The flat analyzer cannot model the mutually-exclusive arms; export lists the EventTimerClock(case 3) shape as a representative — verdict is a TOOL LIMITATION (all 5 modes manually verified). See FieldClock.md.

calls.comment: flag1 (EventTimerClock enable byte; representative arm = case 3 @0x55dac2)

CField_ContiMove::OnContiState.notes: CONTI_STATE / field transport state (clientbound, GMS v87). CField_ContiMove::OnContiState@0x577c21: Decode1(nState v3 @0x577c32) + Decode1(overrideAppear v4 @0x577c35). Switched: 0/1/6 EnterShipMove, 2/5 LeaveShipMove, 3/4 AppearShip (checks v4==1). Matches atlas Transport: WriteByte(state) + WriteBool(overrideAppear). v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x54d5a0).

calls.comment: overrideAppear flag (v4; checked v4==1 in AppearShip case, @0x577c35)

CField::SendTransferFieldRequest.notes: CHANGE_MAP (GMS v87, COutPacket @0x557b97). Client field-transfer request. fieldKey=get_field()->m_bFieldKey @0x557bad. x/y (Encode2 each) emitted only when arg4(sPortal)!=NULL (test @0x557bf4); real callers pass a portal name so x/y travels WITH a non-empty portalName, while the null-portal Revive path sends an empty portalName and no x/y. chase = global dword_CA02A0 @0x557c50 (always present in v87); targetX/targetY only when chase. v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x5345c0).

CUserLocal::CheckPortal_Collision.notes: CHANGE_MAP_SPECIAL (GMS v87). Client portal-script-enter request. Build site @0x9c88bb (type-9 script portal, COutPacket 0x67). fieldKey=get_field()+328 @0x9c88ce. v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x919a10).

CAffectedAreaPool::OnAffectedAreaCreated.notes: SPAWN_MIST (clientbound, GMS v87). v87 layout (8 fields): Decode4(dwId v89 @0x432f6e) + Decode4(nType v91[0] @0x432f78) + Decode4(dwOwnerId v4 @0x432f82) + Decode4(nSkillID a2 @0x432f8b) + Decode1(nSLV Value @0x432f98) + Decode2(phase/delay v87 @0x432fa3) + DecodeBuffer(16, rcArea RECT @0x432fae) + Decode4(tEnd/phase Skill @0x432fba). CROSS-VERSION (task-068 Phase 3 v87): v87 reads ONLY ONE trailing Decode4 after the 16-byte RECT (no tStart), MATCHING v83 @0x431a63; v95 @0x437ec0 adds a leading tStart int32 (2 trailing Decode4s). Atlas matches NEITHER version (atlas writes v83-era origin int16s). STRUCTURAL DEFERRAL — see _pending.md AFFECTEDAREA-create-shape; NOT rewritten in this pass.

calls.comment: nType (mist type; ==3 is item-area-buff branch, v91[0] @0x432f78)
rcArea RECT (16 bytes = ltX,ltY,rbX,rbY as 4x int32, @0x432fae)
tEnd/nPhase (end time, Skill @0x432fba) — v87 has NO leading tStart (matches v83; v95 adds tStart)

CAffectedAreaPool::OnAffectedAreaRemoved.notes: REMOVE_MIST (clientbound, GMS v87). OnAffectedAreaRemoved@0x43388c reads a single Decode4 (affected-area id, v37 @0x4338ae) then despawns; matches atlas. v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x4360a0).

CMessageBoxPool::OnMessageBoxEnterField.notes: SPAWN_KITE (clientbound, GMS v87). Kite = MessageBox field object. Decode4(dwMessageBoxID v58 @0x694e6f) + Decode4(nItemID +56 @0x694eb2) + DecodeStr(sMsg +8 @0x694ebb) + DecodeStr(sCharacterName +12 @0x694eea) + Decode2(ptMessageBox.x +28 @0x694f20) + Decode2(nType +32 @0x694f30). v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x6369c0).

CMessageBoxPool::OnMessageBoxLeaveField.notes: REMOVE_KITE (clientbound, GMS v87). Reads animation flag then id: Decode1(bAnimation v1 @0x69546f) + Decode4(dwID v36 @0x69547b). v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x635d60).

calls.comment: bAnimation (leave animation type; 0 = play despawn animation, v1 @0x69546f)

CMessageBoxPool::OnCreateFailed.notes: CANNOT_SPAWN_KITE (clientbound, GMS v87). Empty body — client reads nothing and shows a StringPool notice (485 @0x694e38). v87 byte-identical to v95 (@0x636760, empty body).
